TEZCATARA.talk.STS2_WINE_FOX_CHARACTER_W: Little one from beyond this world, have you come seeking aid?
Child, let my flames light the road ahead!
Little one, little one who loves food...
I prepared even more for you...
I hope you will enjoy what I made
PAEL.talk.STS2_WINE_FOX_CHARACTER_WINE_F: Seek my father; he will surely answer your questions
OROBAS.talk.STS2_WINE_FOX_CHARACTER_WINE: A creature from beyond?? Pointy ears!! So adorable!!
Cutie!! Cutie!! These are for you!! Sparkly!!
NONUPEIPE.talk.STS2_WINE_FOX_CHARACTER_W: Traveler from another world, defeat the mad master of this place and you can return home
Failed again? Perhaps your power has yet to adapt to this world. Try these
TANX.talk.STS2_WINE_FOX_CHARACTER_WINE_F: Another little orange one!! You must be strong!
What a strange weapon! Spar with me! Let me see what you can do!
You truly are strong! So many weapons at your command! Take this!
DARV.talk.STS2_WINE_FOX_CHARACTER_WINE_F: Traveler from another world! Got any curious trinkets from your world?
Ah, you're back again. Let's trade treasures! Your world has so many things I've never seen - I want all of them in my collection!
You definitely don't have goodies like these over there. Take them and give them a try!
